full_text:
USING BD FACSDiva Software

User: Ashwini > password: (blank)

CST Mismatch window > select Use CST Settings

* Check that there is a green dot on the right bottom corner of the window

Double click the newest compensation experiment

Add new work document (name as yyyy-mm-dd drug treat OR

_ activate by double clicking

_right click to Create Compensation Controls

_Label each Fluorophore to match with target antigens

enzymatic digestion gives autofluorescence

DBMC’s as a control

do a tube, add parameters and select what you have

then go to the create compensations and add your labels on them

Duplicate without data ctrl?D - all data with compensations but no experiments

Experiment layout - add the labels (drag and drop for the next one)

421 and 510 alwasy a bit moreautofluor

cd14 not the best

less than 50 is okay, 60 is still

over 200 something is wrong

titrating antibody is an option

calculate compensations -apply only, check from the compensation tab that everything is below 50

Compensation:

IF the compensation is working, then copy the earlier (working) compensation set up by selecting the work document (double click to activate), on right click Duplicate without data. This allows the use of working compensation, which can then be updated by running the compensation controls again - no need to do extensive work setting all the voltages from zero

IF running a new fluorochrome panel then one should also do the set up from scratch:

Set up a new work document

Add a new tube
